MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Aug-24-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
William Mayoff, Esq. 818-704-7740 Bollington Siz Bloeser & Curry Moving party.
Leslie Basa, Plaintiff is also present via Zoom.

Hearing is held. M. Mayoff informs the Court re communication breakdown with his client. Ms. Basa responds. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

KJ Injury & Accident Lawyers, William Mayoff, Esq.'s Motion to be RElieved as Counsel for PLainntiff Leslie Basa.

Granted. Mr. Mayoff to submit a proposed order on the judicial council form.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)

Motion To Relieve As Counsel
Off Calendar Jun-12-2023 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. IRIS VASQUEZ, Esq. of KJ Injury & Accident Lawyers, P.C. (Tel: 888-775-5529) for movant William B. Mayoff, Esq.;
Plaintiff LESLIE H. BASA present.

Hearing Re: William B. Mayoff, Esq.'s Motion To Relieved As Counsel As To Plaintiff Leslie H. Basa.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court rules as follows: William B. Mayoff, Esq.'s motion to be relieved as counsel is denied without prejudice. Movant may renew this motion if counsel and the plaintiff are unable to work things out.

The Court will not require a formal order regarding the denial of this motion.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
